Our Philosophy

"We believe every woman deserves a sanctuary — a place where she can Relax, Renew, and truly Radiate."

Lavella Spa is a women-owned wellness destination in Karen, Nairobi. With a 5-star reputation and a dedicated team of professionals, we provide luxury spa experiences for every budget.
